name: Num Blast
description: Tap the numbers in the right order before time runs out! Choose between Classic mode with power-ups and Speed Rounds, Sprint 60s for maximum score, the Daily Challenge with a unique puzzle every day, or Math Blast where you solve additions, multiplications and divisions chasing bouncing orbs. Collect power-ups, build combos, unlock achievements and climb the leaderboard. Simple to learn, impossible to stop!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
tags: free html5 games for your website
